content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HMHomeManager is imported and instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5 (`import HomeKit`, `HMHomeManager()`), but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI, accessories, or HomeKit entitlement usage anywhere in the described view.
Pierre: Apple flags apps that import HomeKit but expose no actual home-automation functionality, since HMHomeManager triggers a home-data permission prompt that will confuse users of a wallpaper app and may look like framework misuse or leftover template code. Verify whether the HomeKit entitlement is declared in the entitlements file/Info.plist, and if there's no real home-automation feature planned, remove the `import HomeKit` and `HMHomeManager` instantiation entirely to avoid an unnecessary privacy prompt and review scrutiny.
